title: ChemTech
description: A Minecraft mod that lets you mass consume potions, for a price.
body:
# Summary

Potions are cool but it takes a long time to drink them, especially multiple ones at once. ChemTech lets you create Chem Cartridges which can be filled with up to 27 potions, which can then be mass consumed, for a price.

Be careful, as frequent usage will give you the Debuff Organ Failure. Multiple uses of the Chem Tank within a short period will amplify your Organ failure, causing devastating effects.

Inspired by the show "Arcane".

# Chem Tank

![Chem Tank](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12a8d8612b43c3a4295d9fc6990fd3b8b69c4d78.png)

You can craft the Chem Tank with four iron ingots, two glass, a potion of poison (normal, not extended or strengthened), and two redstone.

Right click the Chem Tank to open a menu where you can load Chem Cartridges.

![Chem Tank Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8e92bff4624aba76528c58ab009e7bf73e4bba0.png)

SHIFT + RIGHT CLICK to consume a Cartridge. It will consume the first one it finds (starting top left), activating all potions from the cartridge. Upon use, you will be given a stack of Organ Failure, and all empty bottles along with the cartridge will be ejected into the air for you to pick up later.



# Chem Cartridge
![Chem Cartridge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7455ce6f2783bb213e02e31f9dbf65ee63495543.png)

You can craft a Chem Cartridge with four glass and four quartz.

Right click the Cartridge to open a menu where you can only load potions (not splash, not lingering, only drinkable potions).



# Organ Failure

Using the Chem Tank will give you Organ Failure I for 1 minute. The symptoms are quite mild, but using the Chem Tank again while under the debuff will increase it to Organ Failure II. Symptoms get worse exponentially, you can expect the following:

* Damage over time
* Nausea, Slowness, Weakness, Blindness
* Vomiting
* Weird visual effects
* Hearing things that aren't there
* Pounding heartbeat
* Being attacked by mobs that nobody else can see.
